Settings

Performance
Embedder model, vector cache, and file watchers are unloaded after this many minutes of inactivity to free resources. Set to 0 to keep loaded.

Agent Integration

Install context instructions for your AI coding agents. This teaches them how to use ast-context-cache efficiently.
